name: vibecodes-terminal-test
description: Automated round-trip proof + stand-in relay + manual xterm page for the terminal slice 1.

scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 roundtrip.test.mjs deep-link.test.mjs proto-reg.test.mjs lifecycle.test.mjs control-frames.test.mjs prompt-launch.test.mjs orphan-cleanup.test.mjs relay-allowlist.test.mjs reconnect-reattach.test.mjs heartbeat.test.mjs expired-reattach.test.mjs zombie-bridge-reattach.test.mjs ../shared/session-token.test.mjs
